protein_name: Scaffolding protein that is part of a multiprotein signaling complex. Promotes phosphorylation of Raf family members and activation of downstream MAP kinases. Promotes activation of MAPK1 and/or MAPK3, both in response to EGF and to cAMP. Does not have kinase activity by itself. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. TKL Ser/Thr protein kinase family. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
